summary: Project with To-Do List feature and Admin Dashboard with restricted access (email: aahanvarma42@gmail.com, password: aahan123).
architectural_notes: Admin dashboard is protected by hardcoded credentials: email aahanvarma42@gmail.com / password aahan123

existing_features.title: Add a To-Do List page in the frontend at route /todos. The page should display all todos fetched via React Query, allow creating new todos (title + optional description), marking todos complete/incomplete, editing todo titles, and deleting todos. Show completed and pending todos in separate sections.
Add a navigation link to the To-Do List page (/todos) in the Header component alongside existing nav links.

Create a dedicated Admin Dashboard page at route /admin-dashboard (separate from the existing AdminDashboard.tsx if needed, or upgrade it). This page must be accessible ONLY when the user has authenticated with email aahanvarma42@gmail.com and password aahan123. Implement a simple credential check gate: show a login form (email + password fields) before rendering the dashboard content. Store the authenticated session in React state or sessionStorage so the gate only needs to be passed once per session.
Upgrade the Admin Dashboard page content to include a To-Do monitoring panel showing total todos, completed count, pending count, and a list of recent todos across all users.
Add an /admin-dashboard route to the TanStack Router configuration in App.tsx pointing to the new Admin Dashboard page component.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a To-Do List feature to the app
Add an Admin Dashboard to monitor the app, accessible only with email: aahanvarma42@gmail.com and password: aahan123

Add a To-Do List feature to the backend: define a ToDo data type with fields for id, title, description, completed (bool), createdAt (timestamp), and optionally owner principal. Implement CRUD operations: createTodo, getTodos, updateTodo (toggle complete / edit title), deleteTodo stored in a stable map.
Generate a migration.mo file to safely upgrade the existing backend stable state to include the new stable todos map without losing existing device, user, event, and rule data.
